nasb.text: Philip and Bartholomew; Thomas and Matthew the tax collector; James the son of Alphaeus, and Thaddaeus;

esv.text: Philip and Bartholomew; Thomas and Matthew the tax collector; James the son of Alphaeus, and Thaddaeus;

cnv.text: 腓力，巴多羅邁，多馬，稅吏馬太，亞勒腓的兒子雅各，達太，

ccb.text: 腓力、巴多罗买、多马、税吏马太、亚勒腓的儿子雅各、达太、

csbs.text: 腓力和巴多罗迈， 多马和税吏马太， 亚勒腓的儿子雅各，还有达太，
